description_long: This object consists of two bananas joined together at the stem, with both showing significant brown mottling and dark spots across their yellow peels. The bananas are slightly curved and have a somewhat glossy surface, with one banana displaying a commercial Dole sticker. The stems are intact, though the tips show minor wear. The peels exhibit areas of bruising and blemishes, especially along the sides and tips, but remain unbroken with no visible tears or splits. The bananas appear to be overripe, as indicated by the extensive browning and soft-looking texture. The overall form is typical of bananas found in urban environments, such as on sidewalks or near markets.
description: A pair of overripe, brown-spotted bananas joined at the stem, with one bearing a Dole sticker and both showing significant surface blemishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows both bananas side by side, with the Dole sticker visible and the most yellow coloration present.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curvature and extensive brown mottling along the outer peel, with less yellow visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backs of both bananas, showing more uniform brown discoloration and less detail of the sticker.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizes the curvature and the transition from yellow to brown, with the sticker partially visible.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana peels are intact but heavily blemished, with numerous brown spots and areas of bruising. There are no visible tears, splits, or signs of peeling, though the surface appears soft and slightly glossy.
